      <div class="resume-role-title">Senior UX Designer · <span class="resume-role-company"><a href="https://xpo.com" target="_blank">XPO Logistics</a></span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="resume-role-dates">Sept 2015 — present</div>
  </div>
  <ul>
    <li>Reduced design and development time with the implementation of a Material Design-based UI library created and maintained with team members.</li>
    <li>Ideate user-centered product solutions through heuristic evaluations, white-boarding sessions, participatory design workshops, and user review meetings.</li>
    <li>Communicate product designs to stakeholders through user flows, wireframes, mockups, and high-fidelity interactive prototypes.</li>
    <li>Collaborate with cross-functional teams in an agile environment to create intuitive mobile and web-based experiences.</li>
  </ul>
</div>

  </div>
  <ul>
    <li>Set experience direction for consumer and business NAS products, contributing to improved Amazon star ratings.</li>
    <li>Designed information architecture for NAS OS 4 to support 3rd-party applications, expanding total available market.</li>
    <li>Reduced time to market by collaborating with product management, development, and engineering teams.</li>
    <li>Improved user satisfaction by converting support feedback into feature enhancements.</li>
    <li>Managed European-based design contractors to meet project deadlines.</li>
  </ul>
</div>
